rationale: Builds directly on the current best late projection EMA finalizer without repeating another EMA-shape experiment. The new change resets only Muon's matrix momentum on the first quant-aware roundtrip, so stale pre-quant optimizer state stops pushing the int8-sensitive matrices away from the late quantized basin while embedding and scalar Adam state stay intact. That specifically targets final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb with minimal hot-loop overhead and keeps the proven projection EMA path otherwise unchanged.
title: Selective Muon Reset On Quant-Aware Entry
